headline: Shell (LSE:SHEL) Signs Five Year SAF Deal With Delta Across Major U.S. Airports
summary: Shell (LSE:SHEL) and Delta Air Lines have signed a new five year agreement for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The partnership aims to increase SAF capacity and related infrastructure across major U.S. airports. The deal includes support for next generation SAF technology development in North America. Shell is using this latest agreement with Delta Air Lines to deepen its role in sustainable aviation fuel, a segment that sits at the intersection of energy and transport. For investors...

headline: Shell (LSE:SHEL) Expands Aviation Fuel Supply, Is It Still Below Fair Value?
summary: Shell (LSE:SHEL) is back in focus after reaching a five year agreement with Delta Air Lines to expand sustainable aviation fuel capacity and infrastructure across key U.S. airport hubs, highlighting the company’s role in lower carbon aviation fuels. See our latest analysis for Shell. Recent news around sustainable aviation fuel and LNG supply comes as Shell’s share price sits at £32.54, with a 30 day share price return of 8.70% and year to date share price return of 17.92%. headline: Joby and Virgin Atlantic Finalize Deal to Bring Electric Air Taxi Service to the UK
summary: FARNBOROUGH, England, July 22, 2026--Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), a company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, and Virgin Atlantic, a premium long-haul UK airline, today signed a definitive agreement at the Farnborough International Airshow, formalizing the partnership the companies first announced in 2025 to bring Joby's air taxi service to the UK.

content.title: Joby and Virgin Atlantic Finalize Deal to Bring Electric Air Taxi Service to the UK
content.summary: FARNBOROUGH, England, July 22, 2026--Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), a company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, and Virgin Atlantic, a premium long-haul UK airline, today signed a definitive agreement at the Farnborough International Airshow, formalizing the partnership the companies first announced in 2025 to bring Joby's air taxi service to the UK.

thumbnail.caption: Joby Aviation's electric air taxi on public display at Potters Field Park in London, July 2026, in partnership with Virgin Atlantic. (Photo: Joby Aviation)
